examples.title: Find-S Algorithm
examples.description: Concept learning algorithm to find the most specific hypothesis consistent with positive examples
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Find-S
INPUT: Positive training examples
OUTPUT: Most specific hypothesis h

BEGIN
 Initialize h to the most specific hypothesis
 FOR EACH positive training example:
 FOR EACH attribute constraint in h:
 IF the constraint is satisfied by the example, do nothing
 ELSE replace the constraint with the next more general constraint
 OUTPUT hypothesis h
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the Find-S algorithm
